node.statement: RESULT E3 (Laughlin wavefunction as variational state): Laughlin's ansatz: Psi_m[z] = prod_{i<j}(z_i-z_j)^m * exp(-sum|z_i|^2/4) at filling nu=1/m (m odd). Is EXACT ground state of hard-core model V_{m'}=0 for m'>=m (since every pair has relative angular momentum >=m). For Coulomb: overlap with exact GS >0.99 for N<=10 (P04-Fano Table I). [P02-Laughlin; P11-Girvin eq (1.105); P04-Fano Table I overlaps]
